message:
style(tests): Suppress pedantic lints in test infrastructure

Add #![allow(clippy::nursery)] and #![allow(clippy::pedantic)] to:
- tests/common/mod.rs
- tests/fixtures/mod.rs

Test infrastructure code prioritizes clarity and developer ergonomics
over production-level lint pedantry. These modules provide test
utilities (assertions, mocks, fixtures) where relaxed lint rules
are appropriate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
